description_long: This is a young adult male with a modern, urban style, featuring a varsity-style jacket with bold, graphic wing motifs on the back and contrasting sleeves. He wears matching athletic pants with graphic patches and fitted sneakers, giving a sporty and fashionable appearance. His hair is styled in a voluminous, spiked fashion, adding to the contemporary look. The clothing is detailed with seams, ribbed cuffs, and a buttoned front, suggesting a blend of comfort and streetwear aesthetics. The figure stands upright with a confident posture, hands relaxed at his sides. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall impression is of a stylish pedestrian suited for city environments.
description: A stylish young adult male in a varsity jacket, graphic athletic pants, and sneakers, with a spiked hairstyle and confident stance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed jacket front, athletic pants, and spiked hairstyle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the jacket's sleeve, pants' side graphics, and profile of the hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large wing motifs on the jacket's back and the back details of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the sleeve, pants' side graphics, and the hairstyle profile from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: varsity-style jacket and athletic pants with graphic details
